body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Phase Body-energy bridge-v3 targeted acquisition.

**Cardiac, respiratory, and gastric rhythms independently modulate motor corticospinal excitability in humans.** — PLoS biology (2025). PMID: 41223212. DOI: 10.1371/journal.pbio.3003478. Score: 44. Interoception refers to the brain'ssensing of internal body state and encompasses various bodily systems, notably the cardiac, respiratory, and gastric rhythms. Beyond their roles in physiological regulation and emotional states, each of these visceral rhythms has been shown to influence brain activity and cognition, prompting for the development of various interpretative functional frameworks.
